name: Corn Bread from Scratch
recipeInstructions:
To Cook: In a medium bowl, sift together the flour, cornmeal, sugar, baking powder, and salt. Make a well in the center. Turn the egg, milk, and melted butter or oil into the well and beat into the dry mixture until just moistened. Pour the batter into a greased 2-quart mold, cover with a plate, and place on a trivet or rack in the bottom of the slow cooker. Cover the cooker, cook on high for 2 to 3 hours. Makes 6 servings.
Source: "Clear & Simple Crockery Cooking", by Jacqueline Heriteau, Grosset & Dunlap, NY, c1975.
